---
title: "Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions."
description: "Robin Lovelace (2008). Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions.. *Nature*."
date: "2008-09-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_energy_2008"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Nature"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Nature
**Year:** 2008

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2008). Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions.. *Nature*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_energy_2008,
  title = {Energy: Efficiency Gains Alone Won't Reduce Emissions.},
  shorttitle = {Nature},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2008},
  month = sep,
  journal = {Nature},
  volume = {455},
  number = {7212},
  pages = {460},
  issn = {1476-4687},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
